Figure 10: Communication speedups of our ZipCCL over baselines with NCCL on DeepSeek-V3, Qwen3MoE, and Llama3-8B across different GPU counts. All-to-All is measured for DeepSeek-V3 and Qwen3MoE, while All-Gather is measured for Llama3-8B.
